name: Team Warren
subject: Will you chip in for the first time ahead of our FEC deadline to invest in this movement right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
When people tell Elizabeth that something just isn't possible, she proves them wrong. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299d5/45c30650/1341cb630/668d1af2/4176215535/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When we released our fundraising numbers last quarter, some pundits were surprised. They were surprised that our grassroots movement kept pace without big dollar donors and closed-door fundraisers -- that we had the resources to compete, and win.

But, there's been a pattern for a while. **When people tell Elizabeth that something just isn't possible, she proves them wrong**.

When Elizabeth started working to create a consumer agency, people said she would never get it past the big banks and their friends. But she took them on, and she beat them.

When, in her first campaign, she started 17 points down against a popular incumbent Republican Senator, people told her she was going to lose. She took him on, and she beat him.

**When we aren't afraid of the critics -- and invest in the change we truly believe in -- we win.**

**[Will you chip in for the first time ahead of our FEC deadline to invest in this movement right now? Together, let's show strength in our public fundraising report again.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299d5/45c30650/1341cb630/668d1af5/4176215535/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KODFGX0VPUV9HUk1fVF8yMDE5MDkyNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ81F_EOQ_GRM_T_20190924_V1S1_P")**

>
Since we launched this campaign, this entire movement has stepped up to show that we're ready for a new vision of politics.

We raised $19.1 million last quarter, and we got there with an average donation of just $28.

**People said that we couldn't stick to our principles and win. But we're going to be in this fight all the way not in spite of our principles, but because of them.

Because we're building a grassroots movement from the bottom up.**

**[Will you be one of the grassroots donors that powers this campaign in the last week of the fundraising quarter? Every donation before our FEC deadline makes a real difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285299d5/45c30650/1341cb630/668d1af5/4176215535/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2VvcSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1KODFGX0VPUV9HUk1fVF8yMDE5MDkyNF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ81F_EOQ_GRM_T_20190924_V1S1_P")**

Thanks again for all you do,

Team Warren

subject: what I said on stage…

body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprs6IVfD4KXkzUY6DYgdWQDy8EgR69LeHbsu2I42YeowT&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190924_2&n=1) The American people deserve a president who will abide by the rule of law and protect our democracy from attacks — both at home and abroad. **Donald Trump is not that president.** [**I hope you got a chance to watch the debate tonight and are willing to chip in to our campaign today to help us make Donald Trump a one-term president.**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprs6IVfD4KXkzUY6DYgdWQDy8EgR69LeHbsu2I42YeowT&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190924_2&n=2) Thank you,
Bill | | [DONATE ➞](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22_Fd-VzwAxfK4yQaxX8_NdrPx9iRtnx9qPBHUugKNprs6IVfD4KXkzUY6DYgdWQDy8EgR69LeHbsu2I42YeowT&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190924_2&n=3)

name: Team Yang
subject: If we meet this goal…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
A new Suffolk University/USA TODAY Network Poll has Andrew at 3% in Nevada -- that leaves us two short of qualifying for the next round of debates.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd) **BREAKING:
We just got another qualifying poll in NV!** [Chip in to help Andrew qualify for the next debate](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=9&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd) Friend --

A new Suffolk University/USA TODAY Network Poll has Andrew at 3% in Nevada -- that leaves us two polls short of qualifying for the next round of debates. [ **Rush a contribution now so we can build on this momentum and send Andrew to the White House.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=18&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)

We’ll get straight to it -- we need to raise $1.5 million by September 30th for us to be able to win. If we can’t do it, we’re going to have to seriously cut back on our investments in the important early states.

[ **We know $1.5 million sounds like a lot, but other candidates are throwing exclusive fundraisers with wealthy donors and pouring millions of their own money into their campaigns. We’re relying on you -- if everyone steps up, we can blow this $1.5 million goal out of the water. Can you chip in now?** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=17&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=15&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=14&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=11&amount=25&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
---

**If we meet this goal,** we’ll be able to keep building the organization needed to compete for the nomination. **If we don’t meet it,** we will fall behind.

**If we meet this goal,** the mainstream media will be on notice that our campaign is up to the challenge and in this for the long haul. **If we don’t meet it,** they’ll continue to dismiss us as a novelty campaign that’s not worth taking seriously.

**If we meet this goal,** we’ll be listed among the top campaigns in the race for the nomination and bring our campaign into the home stretch in a position of strength. **If we don’t meet it,** we’ll be in a weakened position that will be difficult to recover from.

[ **Our policies will transform our country -- but only if we win. So I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to help us meet this goal.** ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=20&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10883?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd)

Team Yang

But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=687%2E377263%2ENLiGtd) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

## Thank you for your votes!
---
| | The past month has been a blast - learning something new, stepping out of my comfort zone, making friends and wearing some outfits I may not have picked out for myself. Now, because you all tuned in and voted last night - I get to continue another week. I was humbled by your support. Thank you doesn't begin to express my appreciation.
I hope you all will keep watching and voting on Monday nights and have fun watching me and my pro partner Lindsay learn new dances for each week.

This Monday, Sept 30 we will be doing a Cha-Cha, be sure to tune in - it'll be a fun one.
---
| [ ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3ea6cf0360&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
Click here to watch our segment from this weeks episode, including the beginning of the Spicer Arnold campaign and this weeks dance.
|
---
| **Last week's green shirt got some attention, so much that we decided to auction it off and give the proceeds to two organizations very near and dear to me.

Half of the proceeds are going to The Yellow Ribbon Fund, an organization dedicated to supporting the caregivers and families of wounded veterans. The other half will go to The Independence Fund, an organization that provides tracked, all terrain wheel chairs to wounded veterans to return some of their independence to them.

The auction for the green shirt will end tomorrow at 12pm, Noon ET, so if you are looking for a really good Halloween costume, check it out [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7c8fe29686&e=f6564bbe3b).**
---
|
---
| | We're excited to have launched the online store for the Spicer Arnold 2019 campaign gear and to announce that, just like the auction of the green shirt, all of the proceeds will go to The Yellow Ribbon Fund and The Independence Fund. Get all your Spicer Arnold t-shirts, hats, bumper stickers, mugs, pins and more [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=baabb2ca61&e=f6564bbe3b).
---
| I hope you're enjoying following along as I try and learn to dance and will keep up the voting as the season continues.

Thanks,

_Sean_

name: Cory Booker
subject: The DNC has raised the debate stage threshold again, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- **Yesterday, the DNC raised the debate stage threshold to 165,000 unique donors.** That means in order for me to be on the debate stage in November, we need to grow this grassroots team by the thousands. **[I know we can do this with your help. Please chip in today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190924_CB_20190924-fr-CB-165kzombie-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=1,5,10,22,50")** This new 165,000 donor threshold underscores the reason we're being radically transparent with you. The bar in this race has gotten higher and it will continue to. It's not just the DNC threshold -- our campaign needs to scale up to have a chance to stay in this race and compete to win the nomination. **That 's why we need your help.** It's more important than ever before to join our team and make sure our collective voices are heard on the national stage. **[Can you chip in $1 for the first time and become a debate stage donor?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190924_CB_20190924-fr-CB-165kzombie-ndnr_ndnr_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=1,5,10,22,50")** I'll be honest team: **We don 't have 165,000 individual donors yet.** This is a crowded Democratic primary, and debates offer some of the only opportunities for an underdog campaign like ours to break through -- to get a chance to compete on a level playing field with those other campaigns that are raising tens of millions of dollars. Debates are a chance to discuss our shared values -- criminal justice reform, universal health care, bold plans to tackle gun violence, reproductive justice, and legalization of marijuana at a federal level to name a few. It's no secret that our campaign is an underdog in the race. I'm used to being counted out -- we've seen it before when I ran for mayor of Newark. And we were doubted when we took on big challenges in the Senate. But we've always come together to win. **Can you chip in today to help me qualify for future debates?** | If you've saved your payment information with
ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Angie Craig and Tina Smith
subject: Minnesotans that stick together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Two years ago we unseated Jason Lewis in Congress, because we had enough of his right-wing extremism. It took grassroots support to keep Lewis' hateful views out of Washington, and now that he's runni

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190924craigsmith-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

We are all coming together on this.

We've seen the kind of representation Jason Lewis brings to Washington. The kind that hurts working families by siding with big corporations and Wall Street instead. The kind that is extreme, right-wing, and offensive to women, people of color, and members of the LGBTQ+ community.

The representation Jason Lewis provides does not speak toward Minnesotans' values.

When Angie defeated Jason Lewis last year, we had hoped that his hateful rhetoric would be out of Congress for good. But now he's running for the Senate against Tina.

**That's why we have come together to fight against our common opponent in this critical race and make sure that this campaign is as strong as possible.**

**[It's going to take all of us coming together to defeat Jason Lewis. Please rush $10 or as much as you can now so we can defend Minnesota's Senate seat.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190924craigsmith-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4136d/c1f7015/67a8f821/11459806/1802705314/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoiYWNfdGluYS1zbWl0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MjRjcmFpZ3NtaXRoLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190924craigsmith-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

We are going to be honest: This election is going to be tough.

Jason Lewis is banking on the support of Trump and Mitch McConnell to flip our state. Already money is pouring in, and even networks like NBC and CNN are calling this race as vulnerable.

Angie knows what it takes to defeat that kind of machine. And Tina's not going to back down from this fight.

**We can only succeed when we work together, and we have to start now. It's going to take grassroots supporters like you to defend Tina and Minnesota from the big checks Jason Lewis will pocket.**

**[Rush $10 or as much as you can now if you're committed to saving Minnesota's Senate seat.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190924craigsmith-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Angie Craig (beat Lewis in 2018)
and Tina Smith (ready to beat him in 2020)
****U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.**** **[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ac_tina-smith?refcode=em190924craigsmith-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: We have no choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I've said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from President Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dd/691c9bd/6e1053ee/11a7accd/3196888136/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

I've said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from President Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry.

Now, with reports that the president allegedly held up American military aid as he accused a political opponent of corruption with a foreign power, we as a country have no choice but to get to the bottom of this.

I'm calling on Cory Gardner to stop enabling the cover-up and demand a full and thorough investigation of this president's wrongdoings.

[**_Will you add your name alongside mine and stand up for truth and accountability?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dd/691c9bd/6e1053ee/11a7acca/3196888136/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/president-trump-isn-t-above-accountability?source=em_fr_20190924_JH_20190924-fr-JH-impeachmentinquiry-all") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dd/691c9bd/6e1053ee/11a7acca/3196888136/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/president-trump-isn-t-above-accountability?source=em_fr_20190924_JH_20190924-fr-JH-impeachmentinquiry-all") Thank you,
John

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Stop Impeachment: Help President Trump
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,Nancy Pelosi and her allies like my Democratic opponent now support an impeachment inquiry into President Trump. President Trump may be IMPEACHED unless we fight back! Never in my years of public service have I seen an American president be subjected to these kinds of hyperbolic claims, misleading accusations and partisan attacks. I have an obligation to the people of the 1st District of Ohio to stop this misuse of congressional power to advance a partisan agenda. I will vigorously oppose this impeachment sideshow in Washington because I believe that in the people's House, we should be focused on doing the people's business.**I need your help, friend.[Can you give $50, $100 or $200 to stop impeachment?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-y/) I know this is asking a lot, but our President could be impeached. This is our moment to stop the far-left that will do anything to advance their radical agenda and impeach the president. Will you answer the call?** [STOP IMPEACHMENT: GO ALL OUT FOR TRUMP](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-j/) These far-left politicians like Pelosi, AOC and my Democratic opponent are dividing our nation with their impeachment obsession. This is why I need your help, friend. **My opponent supports impeachment -- we need to push back.**If President Trump is impeached, this could be your last chance to show that you support him. [**Can you go ALL OUT with your donation to help me protect Trump?**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-t/) [STOP IMPEACHMENT: PITCH IN](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-i/) **Your donation will help me stop impeachment. ****- Steve Chabot** | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdjjdjz-kujkulhluu-h/)

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Joe Sestak statement on autism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
**STATEMENT BY ADMIRAL JOE SESTAK**
Autism, or Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD), affects millions of families across the United States. **As a member of Congress, I fought hard to secure the first new federal funding for autism treatment and services in over twelve years.** The vehicle was the annual defense appropriations bill for fiscal year 2009 and the focus was increasing funds for families who have a loved one with ASD. At the time, I said this: “A new case of an autism disorder is diagnosed every 20 minutes, affecting one in every 150 American children as the fastest-growing serious developmental disease in the United States.” Sadly, in the decade since then the autism rate has risen to one in every 59 American children. Of course, it’s still quite unclear whether these numbers point to a steep increase in cases of ASD or merely in better public education about the condition and increased diagnoses, but in either case it is a serious concern demanding far more attention from policymakers.
**Some doctors and researchers are concerned that because of the complex nature of Autism Spectrum Disorders — and the wide range of treatments that have been tested — there may never be a complete “cure.” But there have been many advancements, and research is still revealing new information about autism every day.** Some believe that gene therapy may yet provide a cure. But most everyone believes that early diagnosis and intervention can improve quality of life for people with autism and their families. Due to the brain’s plasticity, especially when children are very young, early intervention with the latest behavioral therapy techniques is showing great promise. **We must increase funding, as part of the transition to a universal healthcare system, for evidence-based, medically necessary therapies and services for people with autism.** And we must also increase funding for expanded research into the efficacy of various therapies, because there still has not been nearly enough such research thus far.
Critically, **we must also devote more resources to discovering the cause or causes of autism.** While a “cure” still proves evasive, we must do everything we can to reduce the number of cases of ASD. We need to find out why the rate of autism is increasing faster among African American and Hispanic people, after having long been more prevalent among the white population, and how environmental factors and genetic factors come into play. Scientists are exploring many theories — from prenatal infection to hereditary genetics, chemical exposure to gastro-intestinal microbes, and combinations of multiple factors — but they lack the necessary resources to swiftly come to any conclusions. **The federal government must step up and find the funding required to get the job done.** We have no way of knowing how such research may improve the lives of people living with autism already, but we know it is our best chance at reducing the number of cases in the future.
**I fought throughout my time in Congress to increase support for individuals and families living with autism, beginning with military families. As President, I will continue to do everything in my power to support all Americans with autism and their families.**
If you'd like to know more about my positions on autism, on healthcare more generally, or on other issues, please visit my website at [www.joesestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10256761/102877154/1099858848?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWRkMjAyOC05NmRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsUy6X_IirQU-vHTGp3bkF6GhrQpID0lzCTYnEQKyJk=&emci=8b25212d-41df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&emdi=c1dd2028-96df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=250798). You can also contact my press team for more information at [press@joesestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10256762/102877155/-422097957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWRkMjAyOC05NmRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RsUy6X_IirQU-vHTGp3bkF6GhrQpID0lzCTYnEQKyJk=&emci=8b25212d-41df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&emdi=c1dd2028-96df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=250798) or (914) 272-5803.
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Why I must run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
When asked why I am running, here it is (from _Hobson’s Choice_ , Wall Street Journal, May 14, 1952, that I give to anyone who works for me):
_On the sea there is a tradition older even than the traditions of the country itself and wiser in its age than this new custom that men should no longer be held accountable for what they do as well as for what they intend. It is the tradition that with responsibility goes authority and with them both goes accountability._
_This accountability is not for the intentions but for the deed. The captain of a ship, like the captain of state, is given honor and privileges and trust beyond others. But let him set the wrong course, let him touch ground, let him bring disaster to his ship or to his men, and he must answer for what he has done. No matter what, he cannot escape._
_It is cruel, this accountability of good and well-intentioned men. But the choice is that or an end to responsibility and finally, as the cruel sea has taught, an end to the confidence and trust in the men who lead, for men will not long trust leaders who feel themselves beyond accountability for what they do._
_And when men lose confidence and trust in those who lead, order disintegrates into chaos and purposeful ships into uncontrollable derelicts_ —which has happened too much to our U.S. Ship of State today.
I am running to restore the trust to America, of who we are and what we truly stand for, when united together.
Help me lead this nation to our true greatness: integrity and honor, service to country, to others, above ourselves. That is who we are, and who we must be to restore American greatness to the world as the ideal of how to be.
I promise to serve you, above party, above self, above any special interest...no matter the cost.
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10259552/102898870/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGUwNDcwMS1hMWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGdS2kRmdQv7Fi87bDLBhUY3vEf1cyezc9azY8Vfbz0=&refcode=em092519p)
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10259553/102898871/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGUwNDcwMS1hMWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGdS2kRmdQv7Fi87bDLBhUY3vEf1cyezc9azY8Vfbz0=&refcode=em092519button)

I'm Matt Rains and I'm running for Congress to represent the great state of Montana!

[Check out our website to watch our launch video and learn more about why I'm running >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10264846/102940783/-1515231111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBlNDE0Yi1iM2RmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5O2vqiNiIATDlRXhCp3yQJ2dvL09He2g2DBWdoWxPg=&emci=fa1e5a96-ead3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=210e414b-b3df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=8326059) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10264847/102940785/-1515231111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjAzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBlNDE0Yi1iM2RmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5O2vqiNiIATDlRXhCp3yQJ2dvL09He2g2DBWdoWxPg=&emci=fa1e5a96-ead3-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=210e414b-b3df-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=8326059) I'm a West Point veteran, a rancher, and most importantly, a proud Montanan who believes that something needs to be done.

body:

Friend,

**After hearing of potential bias in email delivery during the 2018 midterms, we want to make sure you are not being affected.**

_Our team has been alerted to the results of a study showing Republican emails going directly to spam folders – especially Gmail._

If you have about 20 seconds on your hands, you can help us fix this problem – just follow the instructions below.
1\. Open any email from the Holcomb Crew. (Note: It might be in your spam folder.)
2\. Click the 3 Dotted Button next to the Reply Button.
3\. Click “Add Holcomb Crew to Contacts List”

This is all you have to do to make sure that messages from Gov. Holcomb appear at the top of your inbox. Thank you for helping us stay in touch with you!

\- Holcomb Crew

Yesterday, we launched our campaign video, and it's off to a great start. 40,000 views on Twitter, 4,600 on Facebook, and these numbers are growing by the minute. We've also had local and national media share the video, celebrities like Danny Glover, union leaders like Sara Nelson, even the Washington Post food critic! We are getting traction, but we have a little ways to go. If we can get above 100,000 views today, not only will that show the strength of our message, but it will bring in money and volunteers and support, everything we need to win this race and get real representation for the people of Texas. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Joe Sestak statement on suicide in the Navy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
**STATEMENT BY ADMIRAL JOE SESTAK**
It was with a very heavy heart that I read the report that three young men serving aboard the U.S.S. George H.W. Bush committed suicide last week. The dramatic rise in suicides among our Navy and our military at large — as well as among the whole American population — is deeply troubling and so very sad. The terrible news out of Norfolk is a stark reminder that suicide is a widespread problem in our military. It is a monumental challenge which we must not fail to take on. We owe it to the people who put their lives on the line by volunteering to serve our country.
For me, this latest story brings back an awful memory from my time as commander of a Navy ship. One day, when we were docked at our home port, I said “Good morning” as I came aboard to the young enlisted radioman who handed me my radio messages from overnight. We chatted briefly and then I continued on about my day. A few hours later I received a call: that young radioman had committed suicide at home during lunchtime. Like so many of the people left behind by suicide, I was left reeling. I thought, “What had I missed?” The days and weeks that followed that young man’s death were dark for me and for my entire crew. I spent time thinking about what life is like overall for our servicemembers and especially the personal sacrifices we all make when we choose to serve. Navy life is not easy. To be away at sea for six months, then return home and still spend most time training at sea, only to be redeployed overseas again within a year — all to be well ready and prepared for any war or conflict.
The challenge is just as great — or greater — for our families. Having a partner or parent simply gone for so long is harsh. The length of such separations, and the uncertainty of not knowing at times when that loved one will return home, is profoundly unsettling. We used to say that the toughest job in the military is military spouse. Children of career servicemembers are impacted as well, more likely to struggle in school than their counterparts and to face behavioral health challenges, no doubt at least in part resulting from having a parent (or both parents) gone so often and being forced to uproot themselves as often as every two or three years. And of course when the family of a servicemember struggles, it’s hard for that servicemember not to blame themself. After all, we chose the military life. Our families, usually, did not. I have no doubt that these family dynamics often are contributing factors when a sailor or soldier takes their own life.
For those who stay for a whole career, the majority of the youth have been found to be fundamentally dissociated with life in high school, as one or more parent is gone so often and they must move every two or three years.
Military life means a life of sacrifice. It means handing personal control of your daily circumstances to a system of which you are but one small part, being willing to sacrifice your own life in service to something bigger than yourself. And it is that sacrifice that means we owe it to the people who sign up to create as supportive a working environment as possible.
**Suicide is an issue for all Americans. We must all look out for our friends, family, and co-workers, especially those who are dealing with mental health challenges. We must remove the stigma around talking about suicide. And we must ensure access to the help and support needed for anyone who’s hurting — with special emphasis given to those who wear or have worn the cloth of this nation. That is the best way to honor the service and sacrifice of those we’ve lost. **
If you'd like to read all of my statements and positions, please visit my website at [www.joesestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10268226/102965551/1099858848?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0YTk1OS1iZWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LMZXIehEFUDJ67BTINAG9dsSQd9YKLH7K557cdbtHqw=&emci=be91d913-badf-e911-b5e9-281878540838&emdi=0104a959-bedf-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=250798). You can also contact my press team for more information at [press@joesestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10268227/102965552/-422097957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0YTk1OS1iZWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LMZXIehEFUDJ67BTINAG9dsSQd9YKLH7K557cdbtHqw=&emci=be91d913-badf-e911-b5e9-281878540838&emdi=0104a959-bedf-e911-b5e9-281878540838&ceid=250798) or (914) 272-5803.
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.

P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be91d913-badf-e911-b5e9-281878540838/0104a959-bedf-e911-b5e9-281878540838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTA0YTk1OS1iZWRmLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg1NDA4MzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LMZXIehEFUDJ67BTINAG9dsSQd9YKLH7K557cdbtHqw=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: no one is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Friends,

Over the last several days, it has been reported that the president was withholding foreign aid from one of our allies before he pressured their leaders to interfere in our elections by attacking his political rivals.

If what's reported is true, this would be a clear abuse of power and a danger to our national security and foreign policy.

Our presidential politics have no place in our relationships with other countries.

[I've said it before and I will say it again, this president has committed impeachable offenses and an inquiry is needed.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf70/134673f2/ab63325/699619be/388516863/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Trump-Impeachment?source=EM_PET_B1_092519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

The House is doing what it needs to do. We have to make our case for the American people and make sure the people come along with us.

[That's why I'm asking you today to sign on in support of the impeachment inquiry announced in the House.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf70/134673f2/ab63325/699619be/388516863/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Trump-Impeachment?source=EM_PET_B1_092519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

While the Senate agreed unanimously to a resolution calling for the whistleblower complaint to be turned over to Congress, we still don't know if the administration will comply.

We need to protect the whistleblower, and the Director of National Intelligence must hand over the complaint to Congress immediately. No one is above the law.

[If you support a full and transparent impeachment inquiry, I need to know you're standing with us. Add your name today >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf70/134673f2/ab63325/699619be/388516863/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/Trump-Impeachment?source=EM_PET_B1_092519_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Democracy depends on all of us,

Michael
---

clean_body: | | | Friends, Over the last several days, it has been reported that the president was withholding foreign aid from one of our allies before he pressured their leaders to interfere in our elections by attacking his political rivals. If what's reported is true, this would be a clear abuse of power and a danger to our national security and foreign policy. Our presidential politics have no place in our relationships with other countries. "=" The House is doing what it needs to do. We have to make our case for the American people and make sure the people come along with us. "=" While the Senate agreed unanimously to a resolution calling for the whistleblower complaint to be turned over to Congress, we still don't know if the administration will comply. We need to protect the whistleblower, and the Director of National Intelligence must hand over the complaint to Congress immediately. No one is above the law. | Team, **Spoiler alert: We 're almost to $1 million raised of our $1.7 million must-hit goal -- $987,395.35, to be exact. We're blown away, but we need to raise $155,000 TODAY to stay on track.** We're making great strides, team, but we can't get too confident. We have just six days left to raise the next half of our goal before the September 30th deadline. And the new DNC debate stage threshold of 165,000 unique donors makes donating at this time in our campaign more critical than ever. **I know we can make the next debate stage and hit this goal with your help. You're seeing the exact same numbers I am, team -- thousands of supporters have joined our campaign since Saturday to say they believe that Cory's voice belongs in this race. Raising $987,395.35 in this short time isn't something an underdog campaign like this can do easily.
Cory decided to run for president because he believes that the only way to beat Donald Trump and heal our country is to bring people together. **During these past few days, he 's shown once again that he's the candidate who can do exactly that.**
Whether you're all in for Cory or simply believe the Democratic field is stronger because he is in it, now is the time to make your voice heard. **[Chip in today to make it happen.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-q3eoq?refcode=em_fr_20190925_AD_20190925-fr-AD-progress-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Six days left, team.
Hope. Hype. Hustle.
Addisu

subject: Sara is personally asking you to make a contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline [VIDEO]
body:
We'll let Sara do the talking!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c48/4bef7a87/68903fa4/287f3eec/2506465281/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
I was about to ask you to make a contribution before our FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th.
But Sara just recorded this video for her supporters, so I'll let her do the talking instead. [**Watch her video and then add your donation here -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c48/4bef7a87/68903fa4/287f3ee3/2506465281/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-eoq-sept?refcode=em190925-1-full")

When this deadline is over, we'll have to publicly report not just how much money we raised, but how many individuals chipped in to get us there.
That metric is _really_ important, because that's how we prove Sara Gideon has the grassroots support she will need to defeat Susan Collins.
So please, add your contribution - of any amount - at this link:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/EndOfQuarterDeadline](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c48/4bef7a87/68903fa4/287f3ee3/2506465281/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-eoq-sept?refcode=em190925-1-full")**
Thanks in advance for your support. Sara and I are counting on you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c48/4bef7a87/68903fa4/287f3ee3/2506465281/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-eoq-sept?refcode=em190925-1-full")**

name: Team Beto
subject: Looking over our records...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Does this look right to you?

We’ve been looking over our records before end of quarter and it looks
like you haven’t yet made a gift to help us reach our $750,000 goal:

Supporter ID: ID #888422
Contributed to our goal? Not yet
Suggested Contribution: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35111?refcode=ema20190925-57347&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=57347%2E444211%2E8ZBGXM ]$3

The goals we set aren’t arbitrary numbers made up by our finance team.
They’re based on what we need to bring in to keep everything moving
forward as planned. Whether or not we reach our goals does have a real and
major impact on the future of our campaign.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35111?refcode=ema20190925-57347&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=57347%2E444211%2E8ZBGXM ]Your gift, right now, will help us reach our goal and make sure that
we have the resources we need to keep this campaign going strong. Can you
give your suggested contribution of $3 today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/35111?refcode=ema20190925-57347&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=57347%2E444211%2E8ZBGXM ]Contribute $3

From day one, we said no to PAC money, we turned down corporations, we
brushed off the lobbyists, and we rejected special interests. That means
everything we do — this entire campaign — is 100% funded and supported by
people like you giving to emails like these.

name: Team Yang
subject: 4th place in latest national poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The latest poll from Emerson shows our campaign surging. We are now in 4th place in the entire country, trailing only Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS) **A new national poll from Emerson shows us in 4th place with 8% support** | [Chip in to keep up the momentum](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10889?t=5&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS)
---
Yang Gang --

The latest poll from Emerson shows our campaign surging. We are now in 4th place in the entire country, trailing only Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren.
This is _exactly_ the news we needed heading into the final days before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. **We need to raise $1.5 million before September 30th. And if we don’t hit it, there is no way we can take advantage of the momentum we’re seeing from this poll.[ Friend, we have to act fast. Can you donate now to help us reach our $1.5 million goal? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10889?t=13&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS) **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10889?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS)

---
As a member of the Yang Gang, you’ve probably had the experience of telling your friends and family about your support for Andrew, only to have them look at you and say “Who is that?” Well, now you can tell them your favorite candidate is in 4th place in the Democratic primary.

**We need to make a statement that Andrew has more than just strong polling numbers. And to do that, we must raise enough money to make a splash that the media can’t ignore.

[We have to hit our $1.5 million goal by September 30th to take our campaign to the next level. Please chip in whatever you can right now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10889?t=6&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS) **
[Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/10889?t=14&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS)
---
Let’s do this,
-Team Yang

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=688%2E377263%2E1o3ACS) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Pelosi’s Impeachment Surrender Proves Dems Still Can’t Get Beyond 2016
body:
"For months, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi warned itchy Democrats against the perils of impeachment. She should have stuck to her guns." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0db424e8bd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Pelosi’s Impeachment Surrender Proves Dems Still Can’t Get Beyond 2016**

“For months, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi warned itchy Democrats against the perils of impeachment. She should have stuck to her guns . . . Her surrender proved again that her party can’t quit 2016,” Michael Goodwin writes in the _New York Post_.

“Dems apparently assume the country hates Trump as much as they do . . . They also are demonstrating they didn’t learn the lessons of the Robert Mueller probe.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=722adb4a7c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| At the United Nations, President Trump showed that he “is never afraid to stand up for popular self-government and the greatest guarantor self-government has ever had: the nation-state,” the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=721a127fa3&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Trump did very well in his Tuesday speech to the U.N. General Assembly to reassert, once again, that the nation-state is a good thing; speaking as he was in an institution with misguided supranational ambitions. This was something U.N. bureaucrats and diplomats needed to hear from the leader of the free world.”
---
|
---
| “The leaders of the United States, Mexico and Canada have already signed the most important trade deal in a generation. Mexico and Canada, not China, are currently our two largest trading partners. For the sake of America’s economy and workers, this deal needs to get done,” former CKE Restaurants CEO Andy Puzder writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7db2381c96&e=3ee4985eea). “The only obstacle is political obstruction by congressional Democrats more intent on depriving President Trump of a win than bestowing one on the American people. This is politics at its worst, and that’s saying something.”
---
|
---
| Yesterday, the Trump Administration made it easier for hardworking Americans to qualify for overtime pay, Acting Labor Secretary Patrick Pizzella writes in _[**The Wall Street Journal**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c7e169185b&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The Labor Department is publishing a final rule to raise the salary threshold under which all employees, regardless of occupation, are eligible for overtime pay.” This is the first successful update to overtime regulations since 2004, and the main beneficiaries “will be people who did not go to college, rural Americans and older workers.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c52c1e32a2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25156f4417&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c4fd14a666)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I've said it for months:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I've said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from President Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1e/3004104380/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

I've said for months that there's already enough evidence of misconduct from President Trump to launch an impeachment inquiry.

Now, with reports that the president allegedly held up American military aid as he accused a political opponent of corruption with a foreign power, we as a country have no choice but to get to the bottom of this.

I'm calling on Cory Gardner to stop enabling the cover-up and demand a full and thorough investigation of this president's wrongdoings.

[**_Will you add your name alongside mine and stand up for truth and accountability?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1f/3004104380/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/president-trump-isn-t-above-accountability?source=em_fr_20190925_JH_20190925-fr-JH-impeachmentinquirybump-nop") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1f/3004104380/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/president-trump-isn-t-above-accountability?source=em_fr_20190925_JH_20190925-fr-JH-impeachmentinquirybump-nop") Thank you,
John
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1c/3004104380/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1d/3004104380/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1a/3004104380/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1b/3004104380/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac18/3004104380/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac19/3004104380/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714dc/691c9bd/6e12cff1/11a7ac1c/3004104380/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

subject: Trump "religious freedom" hypocrisy was on full display at the U.N.

body:

| | Hello Peter, On Monday, Trump went before the U.N. to announce new initiatives promoting "religious freedom" and countering religious persecution. This coming from the same president who immediately enacted a Muslim Ban as soon as he came into office. This coming from the same president who wants to allow companies to fire workers if they don't practice the same religion. This coming from the same president who wants to allow discrimination against LGBTQ people because of "religious beliefs." We're wondering what American voters think: **Is Trump a hypocrite on "religious freedom"?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd38/6e9863e8/151e20aa/1db0d4ee/2337864342/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/IqKrmpqI") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd38/6e9863e8/151e20aa/1db0d4ee/2337864342/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/IqKrmpqI") Thanks for answering our survey, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd38/6e9863e8/151e20aa/1db0d4ec/2337864342/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190925a.ND-b&refcode2=WVj29EI5ZkUhikjNW5tO")

name: Team Durbin
subject: Add your name to support the impeachment inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**UPDATE: **Speaker Pelosi announced that the House of Representatives is opening a formal impeachment inquiry of President Trump.
[**Are you standing with Senator Durbin and everyone who called for an impeachment inquiry into the President's potentially illegal actions? Add your name now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")
**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
\---Original Message from Senator Dick Durbin---
**[Add your name: It's time to begin an impeachment inquiry of President Trump.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Today, I am calling on the House of Representatives to begin a formal impeachment inquiry of President Donald Trump.
President Trump himself admitted that, while on a phone call with the President of Ukraine, he sought damaging information about his possible future opponent, former Vice President Joe Biden, while at the same time he was withholding $250 million worth of U.S. military aid for Ukraine as a bargaining chip.
By any reasonable standard, these actions are out of step with our laws and our values, and I believe they warrant an impeachment inquiry.
**[Join me and take a stand for our democracy. Add your name to support the opening of an impeachment inquiry of President Trump now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
The Trump Administration has repeatedly refused to comply with Congressional subpoenas, meaning the only way we can truly move forward with this critically important investigation is by opening an impeachment inquiry.
Because of these and other disturbing developments, I believe that it's now up to Congress to act under our constitutional authority and begin an impeachment inquiry because the American people deserve answers about President Trump's abuse of power and potentially illegal actions.
I didn't come to this decision lightly--but defending our democracy and our nation's values against this reckless President's actions has never been more essential than it is now.
**[Sign on now to stand with me as I call for an impeachment inquiry of President Trump.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4c00/42ab3cf4/61fa078a/135d4410/4229544996/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/support-an-impeachment-inquiry?source=em190925&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *

name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I've spent time reviewing the facts, reflecting on my duty as your Senator to uphold the law, and I've come to a decision: the House should begin impeachment proceedings.

| Team,

I believe we have a duty to look at all of the facts and use them to guide our actions. And I believe that we will look back at this moment and remember whether we spoke out or remained silent.

I've spent time reviewing the facts, reflecting on my duty as your Senator to uphold the law, and I've come to a decision: The House should begin impeachment proceedings.

I support the beginning of these proceedings, because it's a matter of national security and protecting our Constitution and the rule of law.

We must open a process to lay out the facts, as we continue to learn of reports that the President asked - or pressured - Ukraine to interfere in our country's democracy, specifically by undermining a political opponent.

This impeachment inquiry is serious -- and different from removal from office. In our system of checks and balances, an impeachment inquiry is the only way we are able to establish whether a President has abused their power and put their own interests ahead of the security of our nation and the rule of law.

As your Senator, my job is to uphold the Constitution and rule of law. And that means fulfilling my responsibility to listen to all of the evidence before making a final judgment.

I'm speaking out, because I believe it is my duty to you and our democracy.

Thank you,

Senator Tina Smith
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). #
In the last month, we’ve learned that BOTH of Georgia’s Senate seats will be on the ballot in 2020. In the last month, multiple Democrats – including Jon Ossoff, who raised $30 MILLION in 2017 – announced campaigns against David.

**We’re running out of time to show we’re ready for this fight. We’ve only got five days to hit our goal for this quarterly fundraising deadline, and we need you to step up.**

[**Will you rush a donation right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=22e3ba89d8&e=02cd889ad3)

---
| **This is our most critical fundraising deadline yet.** Radical donors, the national liberal media, and outside special interest groups were already targeting Georgia. Now, they’re doubling down on their commitment to winning here in 2020.

**We can’t let that happen!** But David simply can’t do this without you. We must have the financial resources it takes to respond to false attacks AND build the strongest grassroots team in Georgia history!

name: Cory Booker
subject: History will remember those who put politics aside at this time of crisis and treated it like the moral moment that it is.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, This morning, the American people got their first peek into the call between Donald Trump and the Ukrainian president. The White House confirmed what we knew all along: **Donald Trump explicitly asked a foreign government to investigate one of his political opponents.** He pressed the president of Ukraine to investigate his political rival. Not to mention, at the same time he was withholding crucial aid. **[If you're as outraged as I am that our president is undermining our national security and tearing at the fabric of our democracy, add your name next to mine in calling for the impeachment proceedings of Donald Trump. Here's a link to the petition:](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190925_CB_20190925-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190925_CB_20190925-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **This is not a partisan talking point. This is about the moral leadership that the highest office of the land represents.** When I joined the Senate six years ago, I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic; that I would bear true faith and allegiance to the same. **Donald Trump also took an oath to preserve, protect, and defend the Constitution.** **Donald Trump has corrupted the office of the presidency since the beginning, and today the White House produced evidence of a recent and vivid instance of the president undermining our democracy.** These are unprecedented times, but one thing is certain -- we must take action to protect the rule of law and uphold our oath to the Constitution. **[Sign your name here if you agree that it's time to start impeachment proceedings.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/start-impeachment-proceedings?source=em_pet_20190925_CB_20190925-pet-CB-impeachment-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** If we are a people without faith in our laws, we cannot be a people united. Cory
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a31/2903427255/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a30/2903427255/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a3f/2903427255/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a3e/2903427255/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a3d/2903427255/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ba2/5fca0d19/746a0d2b/291f2a31/2903427255/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Tim Walz
subject: Announcing Clean Cars Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, This weekend, thousands of young people across Minnesota, and many, many more across the country joined together to demand solutions to the climate crisis. They're looking at their future, and they're anxious. They know they will bear the consequences if we fail to act, and they're watching as the Trump administration sets us all on a path to disaster, from withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement to dismantling the Clean Power Plan and more. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?refcode=body&amount=25)
---
My friend,
This weekend, thousands of young people across Minnesota, and many, many more across the country joined together to demand solutions to the climate crisis.
They're looking at their future, and they're anxious. They know they will bear the consequences if we fail to act, and they're watching as the Trump administration sets us all on a path to disaster, from withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement to dismantling the Clean Power Plan and more.
To let them know I'm listening, I issued a proclamation to declare it "Climate Week" in Minnesota. But these young activists deserve something far more important than our recognition. They deserve action, and if Washington won't lead on climate, Minnesota will.
**That 's why today, I announced Clean Cars Minnesota** - a brand new initiative to reduce carbon emissions by implementing clean car standards and increasing the choices Minnesotans have when it comes to purchasing electric cars.
As I move forward with the Minnesota Department of Transportation and the Minnesota Pollution Control Agency to enact this urgent plan, I remain focused on working with the legislature to lead Minnesota to 100% carbon-free electricity by 2050. I won't stop fighting until we get it done, but I can't do it alone.
**If you agree that climate change is an existential threat, I 'm asking for your help ahead of our September 30th end-of-quarter deadline. [Please contribute $5 or more to our campaign so we can elect allies in 2020 who will work with us to take the bold steps necessary to address it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)****
****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?refcode=_other-p)****
Climate change threatens the very things that make Minnesota a great place to live, from our magnificent 10,000 lakes to our farmable land and clean air.
We can and will take historic action to reduce carbon emissions, protect public health, create jobs, and ensure our state is at the forefront of the Green Economy.
**Our campaign team is already laying the groundwork to take back the Minnesota Senate in 2020 and elect allies who will help us get the job done.[Please make a contribution that works for you today so they can keep it up. I'm counting on you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Thank you,
Tim Walz

| ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/ng5WnPJsWlrGjjHOQ2lbc3KBAVkRDyYCOVVMlYyBWY0=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********
---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/CQPFAZgWnA1qEAgyTZ8mqTObuJ1ef4TvcDeZlszmMf4=/fgsx2lxKilqLVK8ua24ny_xPQXFcqBRKasoDbEXeFuI=). Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104 United States

Contributions or gifts to Tim Walz for Governor are not tax deductible. The maximum contribution for 2019-2020 is $2,000 per individual or $4,000 per couple. We cannot accept contributions from corporations or LLCs. We are prohibited by campaign finance law from accepting contributions from lobbyists and political committees during the regular legislative session. We are required to collect and report the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per year.

---
Friend--Trump's handpicked candidate finally announced this month that he's running against me, dramatically changing the dynamics of this race.
But here's something we need to change: We're not on track to reach our FEC fundraising goal.
**So I 'm going to be direct.** I'm asking you to contribute $3 to my campaign, so we can finish the quarter strong and ramp up our efforts across the state. **Give $3 by clicking here:[_jamesmackler.com/SeptemberFECGoal._](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa22f/18d6a294/4cf985fb/26d64174/85626622/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://jamesmackler.com/SeptFECGoal")**
All across Tennessee, people are fed up with the dysfunction in Washington. They want new, reliable, and courageous leadership--not a rubber stamp for the president.
There is so much at stake, so we need to keep our heads down and get to work.
I need your help. name: Markey Campaign HQ
subject: Can we get to 80% ◼️◼️◼️◻️◻️??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: We're 78% of the way to our FEC deadline goal, and with Joe Kennedy III in the race to defeat Ed, we need to show our people-powered movement is ready to win.

_**[Rush $27 or more and help us get to 80% before midnight. Pitch in now and stand with Ed!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-092519_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:

* * *

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Our pipes are poisoning us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Lead poisoning from our pipes poses a clear danger to public health, and we've seen what happens when it goes unaddressed. Flint, Michigan has been without clean water for 5 years now \-- officials switched the city's water source to the polluted Flint River in a cost-saving bid, exposing the residents to dangerously high levels of lead and microbial bacteria that sickened them. People have died from the Legionnaires' disease they were exposed to, and the full effects of lead poisoning on the people \-- especially Flint's children \-- are still being determined. Flint is not the only city that has been affected by lead pipes \-- Newark, New Jersey was found to have over 18,000 lead service lines. According to the Environmental Defense Fund, between 6 and 10 million homes in the U.S. have lead pipes. [**It is long past time Congress enacted proper legislation to remove these dangerous pipes and sources of water pollution. Everyone deserves safe and clean drinking water -- please join us today in demanding action!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3a/6e9863e8/15186973/1db0d4da/3245890746/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/flintwatercrisis/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for taking action today, WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3a/6e9863e8/15186973/1db0d4da/3245890746/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/flintwatercrisis/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---

name: Greg Stanton
subject: it all comes down to Maricopa County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:

_But just in case you still don 't believe us..._

Here is an excerpt from _The Atlantic _that lays out exactly how momentum is swinging our way in Maricopa County.

Derek,

_Whoa._ **One of Mark 's Republican opponents just said that Virginia's Senate seat is in the _top three_ most likely to be flipped by a Republican in 2020.** That's a pretty bold prediction, but one we have to take seriously.

**Will you donate to Mark 's re-election campaign right now to make sure that prediction doesn't come true?**

name: Mike Franken
subject: Ukraine Inquiry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
It wasn't something I took lightly, but yesterday I was the first Senate candidate in Iowa to support an impeachment inquiry. Congress needs to know the facts. Is our President pushing his agenda and
|
---

| | Friends -- I'll be candid. [**This is an email asking you to chip in to my campaign**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed4/3415141905/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?refcode=20190925_fr_em") -- here's why. Yesterday, I called for impeachment inquiry proceedings to begin on the President's dealings with the nation of Ukraine. No 36-year military veteran would make that decision lightly. But **if a President chose to withhold congressionally authorized aid out of some trite personal vendetta, or for blatant political gain, he needs to be called to account.** I do not expect Senator Ernst will step out of party orthodoxy and support an effort to determine exactly what the Administration pushed Ukraine to do. That's a principal problem in today's heated political atmosphere, but that's why I am in the race. Iowa deserves a senator who puts their country before their political aspirations. Who is willing to say what needs to be said, even when it's hard -- and say it before it becomes politically convenient. So, here's what I'm asking, friends: **Our end of quarter deadline looms in just five days, and it is mission-critical that we reach our $50,000 goal. It's the only way to put Official DC on notice that there is a real appetite in this race for a candidate who's willing to say what we all know:** Donald Trump doesn't get to play by a second set of rules. [**I hope I can count on your support today. Given the news of the last 24 hours, it is very important than ever that we have a voice in this race who is willing to hold our President accountable.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed4/3415141905/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?refcode=20190925_fr_em") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Contribute $3 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed5/3415141905/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=20190925_fr_em_express_lane_3")
---
[Contribute $10 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed6/3415141905/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20190925_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Contribute $25 Now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed7/3415141905/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20190925_fr_em_express_lane_25")
---
[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2461/33365068/4a660d1f/3f8baed0/3415141905/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-impeachment?refcode=20190925_fr_em_express_lane_other")
---
Thank you for being with me on this,
Vice Admiral Mike Franken, U.S. Navy (ret.)
Candidate for United States Senate
|
---
