name: News Update via info@michaelbennet.com
subject: debate thresholds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, the DNC released a new set of arbitrary debate requirements.

As we saw in a poll just this weekend, 90% of voters haven't decided who they are voting for. Yet the DNC is using polling to winnow the field even further, when it's voters and caucusgoers who should be determining our nominee.

We know it seems like donation requests are constant, but this moment is absolutely crucial for our movement.

[We're facing our end-of-quarter deadline and another debate stage qualifier deadline, so we've set a goal to raise another $150,000 and we only have a few more days to make it happen. name: The Trump Defense Fund
subject: We really need you...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Looks like the witch hunt is going to continue...
We will be quick and to the point ---> we need to [raise $25,000](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014WkEk4MaFL-6MRuBts9RwxPAbhqXHeM1wIw5rb6uyw3twT7sDZyp-Smq4bac3NLnSxCTDVbnNnatf27tOGofdyVe4ZO69pgN5Tmpd_1MLoHZ19tzV9cuvwTa_Y21lEEJzZPTrtdlcpxTf_3G13oOA41lG03BSFVFj2Z_69LOlcY=&c=WS8eJyUS44-yaYTz1nTuBaE8v9LXVo_D_yujm4KrgG4C2yiHnNFReg==&ch=LhMLEgbr2OrOECFlR6kGadfNh3WHB_7IQqdqL4Bc8CC9rCM_-a9nYA==) to defend President Trump.
The Socialist-Democrats are gaining votes fast for impeachment... they are getting close but we can stop them in their tracks (and stop any weak-kneed Never-Trump Republicans).
President Trump is asking for a list of everyone that donates to know who is on his side. body:
---
| | I asked.
Speaker Pelosi asked.
Khizr Khan asked.
James Carville asked.
Deb Haaland asked.
Ted Lieu asked.
Gabby Giffords asked.
Paul Begala asked.
Now I'm asking again.

**That 's how imperative it is that we hit my end-of-quarter goal and flip the Senate.**

I'm facing the most direct and unprecedented attacks of my life.

Trump himself just threw a massive rally here to steal New Mexico from Democrats.

I need to know my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our movement. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190925_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190925_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

To fend off these Republican attacks, I need to come out of this month with an undeniable foundation of support.

Look -- you know I'll have your back every single day in the Senate. Will you have mine with $5 before my end-of-quarter deadline hits in a few days?

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: KY Governor Update
subject: lots of bad headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We've prepared all along for this to be a hard-fought race. But Matt Bevin's campaign appears to be falling apart in the homestretch.
|
---

| | Peter,

We've prepared all along for this to be a hard-fought race. But Matt Bevin's campaign appears to be falling apart in the homestretch.

According to _Politico_ : **" Kentucky governor makes last-minute campaign shakeup" in a _" potentially ominous sign"_** and calls in a D.C. political operative to salvage his flailing reelection.

It's no wonder why Bevin's campaign is such a mess. In recent weeks Matt Bevin has gone after his own lieutenant governor and doubled down on his attacks on teachers. He's still refusing to explain his use of the state plane -- _even saying it 's none of our business what he does with the taxpayer-funded jet._

It's been a no-good, very-bad past few months for him.

But Peter, none of this is going to matter if Matt Bevin and his big-money allies are able to swamp us in spending at the end. **Help us keep the pressure up and donate today.** _If you've saved your name: John Hickenlooper
subject: All hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
It's all hands on deck as we sprint toward next week's quarterly fundraising deadline, team--our first of this campaign. And we're humbled and honored by how many of you have stepped up | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac55/141278892/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_template")
---
| It's all hands on deck as we sprint toward next week's quarterly fundraising deadline, team--our first of this campaign. And we're humbled and honored by how many of you have stepped up already.

A race like this can feel like a marathon. But when I see how people all over Colorado are stepping up to offer their support, and when Coloradans come up to me at events to tell me their stories and the future they want to see for their families, I'm reminded why we're in this fight.

Together, we're building a campaign that'll replace Cory Gardner with a senator who will champion Colorado's priorities every day. [**_I want you to be part of our team --will you make your first donation of the campaign before our first FEC deadline?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190925_JH_20190925-fr-JH-deck-all_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-sep?refcode=em_fr_20190925_JH_20190925-fr-JH-deck-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac51/141278892/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac4e/141278892/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac4f/141278892/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac4c/141278892/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714d3/691c9bd/6e1709ba/11a7ac4d/141278892/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. name: Laura Loomer
subject: They think it’s a "scheme"
body:
The liberal publication that just looooves to hate me, The Daily Beast, covered my run for Congress last week and with the headline, "MAGA Heads Have a New Scheme: Running for Congress."
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921) The liberal publication that just looooves to hate me, _The Daily Beast_ , covered my run for Congress last week with the headline, "MAGA Heads Have a New Scheme: Running for Congress."

The article was a sad attempt to define my race as an unwinnable vanity campaign.

And that's ridiculous.

Here are the facts . . .

My opponent is Democrat Lois Frankel.
Frankel first won a race for Congress in 2012.
In 2014 and 2016, Lois Frankel faced a local Republican who raised a total of $25,272 for BOTH election cycles.
In 2018, Lois Frankel ran unopposed.
It's fair to say that my incumbent Democrat opponent **has faced no real opposition during her entire congressional caree** r.

. . . that is until I announced my run for Florida's 21st Congressional District.

With only [**five days left before our campaign 's first FEC filing deadline**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921), we still need to raise $27,000 more to hit our internal goal.

[**Will you help me hit our goal?**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921)

Democrats and the Left want to prematurely write off my campaign, mainly because they would have convulsions at the thought of me being sworn into office and **sharing the same hallways and hearing rooms as their beloved AOC, Ilhan Omar and even Nancy Pelosi**.

**[But with your help](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921), it will be a reality.**

Only five days remain for us to raise the $27,000 remaining to hit our "shock" goal before we run out of time. If you haven't already done so (or if you can give again), [**please donate today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921).

This season's campaign contribution limits are $2,800 for both the primary election AND another $2,800 for general election. [**So you can give up to $5,600 right now!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921)

**[But even if you can chip in $10, $25, $50 or $100](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921) please do it!**

EVERY DOLLAR COUNTS!

Please help me prove them wrong and [**help me raise the remaining $27,000 before the September 30th deadline**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-4658893-4645c40963-c762159921) - that's just FIVE days away.

And let's see what headlines they'll be writing once our FEC report is out!

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-348767-808464-84585d41bbe610b-c762159921)

Friends -
If Democrats are going to take back the Senate, we have to win in these 3 states:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c4d/4bef7a87/68937b3c/287f3f96/260848213/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190925-2-full")
_\- NBC News_
The good news is, we KNOW we can win in Maine. Susan Collins' approval rating is down _44 points_ since 2017, AND a recent poll showed that **55% of Mainers think it 's time to elect a new Senator.**
The math works for us - but that doesn't mean Sara is going to walk into this Senate seat. Defeating Susan Collins and her special interest backers will be _incredibly_ difficult.
**That 's why we're starting the hard work now, and it's why we can't afford to fall short of our most important fundraising goal yet. Can we count on your support?**
[**Make a $3 donation before our FEC fundraising deadline on September 30th. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation will go a very long way towards helping us win. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c4d/4bef7a87/68937b3c/287f3f96/260848213/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190925-2-full")
Thanks for your support. When Sara wins this race, it will be because people like you believed in us from the very beginning.
All our best,
_Team Sara_
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c4d/4bef7a87/68937b3c/287f3f96/260848213/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MjUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190925-2-full")**

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c4d/4bef7a87/68937b3c/287f3f95/260848213/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c4d/4bef7a87/68937b3c/287f3f94/260848213/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Elaine Chao and Mitch McConnell: Corrupt power couple
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao (who just so happens to be Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell's wife) is under investigation by the House Oversight Committee. She is accused of using her position to get her family members lucrative business opportunities and loans, allegedly totalling in the hundreds of millions of dollars. This comes after she appointed a special liaison to help with grant applications that benefit Kentucky \-- which just so happens to be the state that McConnell represents in the Senate. Her unethical behavior resulted in at least $78 million being spent in Kentucky ahead of her husband's impending re-election bid. She and Mitch are true partners in crime, steering this country down a corrupt path \-- he has been following Trump's every wish and command since he was inaugurated, helping him try to overturn the ACA, forcing through his woefully underqualified and partisan judges, and ensuring Brett Kavanaugh's lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court. Mitch has used every opportunity to bash Democrats and further his partisan agenda while never holding Trump accountable \-- if the impeachment inquiry reaches the Senate, he'll undoubtedly squash it, regardless of the findings. This is not the leadership our country needs. We need people who are going to listen to constituents, collaborate with stakeholders, and behave ethically to move this country forward. We're asking voters what they think about this new development, and we need 105 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell and Elaine Chao?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3c/6e9863e8/1515f1a7/1db0d77f/3324743465/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6yqj0xZT") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3c/6e9863e8/1515f1a7/1db0d77f/3324743465/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/6yqj0xZT") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd3c/6e9863e8/1515f1a7/1db0d77d/3324743465/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=WDTO20190925c.ND-b&refcode2=DtIKTARrkLKb3mxHSaqs")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: 10 events in three days!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc5ab/3806624171/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia")
---
| | Julian made **10 stops** across Iowa this weekend to meet supporters where they're at and share his vision for the future of our country! |
---

On Friday, Julian stood with students in the global #ClimateStrike by participating in a **student climate change forum** in Marion, Iowa to talk about the importance of passing a Green New Deal.

---

Later that night at the** LGBTQ Presidential Forum hosted by GLAAD**, he boldly declared his plans to increase protections for the LGBTQ community. He announced that he would "appoint a task force to investigate and address the murder of transgender black women of color," appoint a cabinet that would reflect the diversity of this country including the LGBTQ community, and assist LGBTQ asylum seekers.

On Saturday morning, Julian joined **Fight for 15** and **Mary Kay Henry** in fighting for $15 minimum wage and the right to unionize at their kickoff rally.

---

The day was just getting started!

It was time to head over to the famous **Polk County Democrats ' Steak Fry**. Team Julian made quite the entrance, dancing and cheering alongside a Mariachi band!

---

---

After showing them how we master the grill in Texas, he addressed all **11,000 attendees** on the main stage at the Steak Fry!

---

In the afternoon, he received a standing ovation when he talked about his immigration plan at the **People 's Presidential Forum** **hosted by Iowa Citizens for Community Improvement. **

---

On Sunday, Julian spoke with volunteers in Des Moines who were preparing to go knock on some doors for a **canvass launch in Des Moines.**

---

He spent his last day speaking with farmers and rural community members in **Jefferson** and **Perry** on the devastating agricultural effects of Trump's trade war.

---

Thank you for all of the support we received throughout this weekend. Can't wait to visit Iowa again soon!

#TeamJulian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc5aa/3806624171/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc5a9/3806624171/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc5a8/3806624171/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc597/3806624171/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc596/3806624171/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf0e/3eb3e2fc/52ac2b6e/744cc595/3806624171/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20190925_em_ia&source=20190925_em_ia"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Suppressed: The Fight to Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
This documentary uncovers the insidious tactics politicians across the country use to suppress the vote and stay in power. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa510/34a064cc/18c89f57/7031013/3008195179/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Tonight, Fair Fighters are hosting watch parties in Georgia and across the country to screen the film, _Suppressed: The Fight to Vote_. This documentary uncovers the insidious tactics politicians across the country use to suppress the vote and stay in power. [**Will you commit to watch the film? Add your name and we 'll send you a link where you can stream the 38-minute documentary right from your computer, tablet, or smart TV.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa510/34a064cc/18c89f57/7031010/3008195179/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/the-fight-to-vote?source=IE092519BNF") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa510/34a064cc/18c89f57/7031010/3008195179/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/the-fight-to-vote?source=IE092519BNF") The truth is that voter suppression is an intentional, systemic response to increased engagement from voters of color, immigrants, and low income voters. We have to recognize that while voter suppression may no longer resemble the images of fire hoses or the laws that explicitly forbade people of color from voting, the same forces that activists and civil rights leaders battled 50 years ago continue to stifle democracy today. But the film does more than tell the story of the voter suppression and election mismanagement we saw here in Georgia last year, it reminds us that we can fight together to achieve a future where all Americans can freely exercise their fundamental right to vote. We're grateful that you are part of our movement to ensure free and fair elections. \- Team Fair Fight
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa510/34a064cc/18c89f57/7031011/3008195179/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thefighttovote?refcode=IE092519BNFS")**

|
